name: pm-verifier
description: One skill that turns any feature spec, PRD, or task description into a complete verification layer: eval-engine produces binary disqualifying gates (with WHY each is a gate, not a score), a calibrated 1-5 LLM-judge rubric with worked examples and a paste-ready judge prompt, and a runnable pure-stdlib Python harness (prepare/run/report) that applies gates first and scores the rest.
